tasks.name: Update page to async component with loader integration

action.target: UserHomePage component to async with data loading

tasks.purpose: Convert page to async server component that imports loader function, calls loadDashboardPageData, and stores result for future widget rendering

dependencies: async/await pattern from team account page
constraints: Store result in const data variable for future use

tasks.input_state: UserHomePage is a synchronous function component with basic imports for PageBody, Trans, i18n utilities, and HomeLayoutPageHeader
tasks.output_state: UserHomePage is an async function that imports Suspense, calls loadDashboardPageData, and stores the result (data not yet consumed)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page file contains 'import { Suspense } from "react"', imports loadDashboardPageData, component is 'async function UserHomePage()', and calls 'await loadDashboardPageData()'
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'import { Suspense }' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'async function UserHomePage' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -q 'await loadDashboardPageData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx

tasks.name: Wrap PageBody in Suspense boundary with loading fallback
tasks.purpose: Enable streaming loading states by wrapping content in Suspense with simple loading placeholder

dependencies: Suspense component from React (imported in T1)
constraints: Add fallback prop with simple loading div containing 'Loading dashboard...' text
Skeleton component from F4 will replace fallback later
Ensure page compiles with pnpm typecheck

tasks.input_state: Page renders PageBody directly without Suspense boundary, component is async with loader data available
tasks.output_state: PageBody is wrapped in Suspense with a simple loading fallback div, page renders without errors at /home route
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PageBody is wrapped in <Suspense fallback={...}>, fallback contains loading text, and page passes typecheck
